contact.pageTitle: Contacto CEEB | Bureau d'Études Paris Val-de-Fontenay

hero.title: Contacta con CEEB en París
hero.subtitle: Nuestra oficina en París está ubicada estratégicamente para apoyar proyectos de transporte e infraestructura en la región.

strategic.title: Ubicación estratégica, acceso fluido
strategic.lead: Nuestra oficina de París está en el corazón de la red de transporte metropolitana, preparada para respaldar cada fase de tu proyecto.

proximity.title: Conectado a grandes centros de transporte
proximity.content: A pocos minutos del RER, metro y trenes regionales, nuestra oficina es fácil de alcanzar desde París y sus alrededores.

clients.title: Cerca de los clientes clave
clients.content: Ubicados cerca de autoridades de transporte, operadores y grandes clientes de infraestructura para una colaboración rápida.

infrastructure.title: Acceso a la red de infraestructura
infrastructure.content: El acceso a carreteras, ferrocarriles y aeropuertos principales facilita los viajes de equipos y socios.

address.heading: Dirección
address.content: 1 avenue du Maréchal de Lattre de Tassigny, 94120 Fontenay-sous-Bois

access.title: Cómo encontrarnos
access.intro: Nuestras oficinas están bien conectadas por tren, metro, tranvía, autobús y carretera.

rer.title: RER
rer.content: RER A hasta Val-de-Fontenay, a pocos minutos a pie de la oficina.

metro.title: Metro
metro.content: La línea 1 proporciona acceso directo al distrito de negocios.

tram.title: Tranvía
tram.content: El tranvía T1 para cerca de la oficina para un desplazamiento este-oeste rápido.

bus.title: Autobús
bus.content: Varias líneas de autobús sirven la estación cercana y las avenidas principales.

car.title: En coche
car.content: Acceso fácil a la autopista y opciones de estacionamiento cercanas.

bike.title: En bicicleta
bike.content: Carriles bici y aparcamiento seguro facilitan los desplazamientos activos.

future.title: Red futura
future.content: Las mejoras previstas reforzarán aún más nuestra conectividad.

airports.title: Aeropuertos
airports.content: Los aeropuertos de París son accesibles en menos de una hora en tren y carretera.

map.title: Nuestra ubicación
map.address: 1 avenue du Maréchal de Lattre de Tassigny, 94120 Fontenay-sous-Bois, France

partners.title: Socios de confianza
partners.subtitle: Colaboramos con líderes del transporte, la infraestructura y el sector público en la región.

footer.description: Un líder en ingeniería, consultoría y diseño para un futuro sostenible.

about.title: Our Multidisciplinary Expertise
about.content1: CEEB: Sustainable engineering at the service of the world
about.content2:
• CEEB has established itself as a key player in sustainable engineering and infrastructure internationally.
  • From rail and airport mobility to urban projects, we support our clients and partners at every stage of their projects, combining technical expertise and strategic vision.
about.content4:
• Our multidisciplinary teams provide services ranging from auditing and consulting to project management and operational support.
  • Through a comprehensive approach, we deliver reliable and innovative solutions, perfectly tailored to the specific challenges of each project.
about.content6:
• From strategic design to commissioning, CEEB leverages its expertise in technical studies, BIM, telecommunications, consulting, and auditing.
  • Each project is an opportunity to transform complex challenges into concrete and sustainable solutions, for high-performing and environmentally responsible infrastructure.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We support companies with tailor-made engineering, consulting, and project management solutions.

suseng.title: Sustainable Engineering
suseng.desc: Resilient and environmentally friendly infrastructure, integrating climate issues from the upstream phases.

infra.title: Infrastructure
infra.desc: Complete design, construction and maintenance of railway and airport infrastructure.

mobi.title: Mobility
mobi.desc: Integrated and intermodal transport solutions, from needs analysis to commissioning.

inter.title: International
inter.desc: Expertise adapted to international contexts with a presence on 5 continents.

urban.title: Urban planning
urban.desc: Integrated urban planning placing transport at the heart of sustainable territorial development.

stra.title: Strategic Advice
stra.desc: Strategic support to optimize investments and maximize returns.

corevalues.title: Our Core Values
corevalues.subtitle: Our core values guide our actions and define our identity as a company.  They reflect our commitment to excellence, innovation, partnership and social responsibility in all our projects and interactions.

corevalues1.title: Technical Excellence
corevalues1.subtitle: Recognized expertise in all areas of transport. Rigor and quality in every project. Constant innovation and continuous improvement.
corevalues1.desc: Technical leadership, quality-driven delivery and continuous innovation to meet project challenges.

corevalues2.title: Innovation & Sustainability
corevalues2.desc: Systematic integration of environmental issues. Cutting-edge BIM and digital solutions. Commitment to the ecological transition.

corevalues3.title: Partnership & Collaboration
corevalues3.desc: Multidisciplinary and integrated approach. Close collaboration with all project stakeholders. Sharing of knowledge and expertise.

corevalues4.title: Social Responsibility
corevalues4.desc: Commitment to territories and communities. Respect for safety and quality standards. Contribution to the local economy.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Discover a selection of our flagship projects.

project1.title: Sustainable renovation of a historic building
project1.desc: Transformation of an architectural heritage into a high-energy performance building.

project2.title: Design of a new urban transport line
project2.desc: Modern transport infrastructure to improve urban mobility.

project3.title: Digital platform for asset management
project3.desc: Innovative digital solution for infrastructure management.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join a team shaping the world of tomorrow.
careers.content: At Ceeb, we offer a stimulating work environment where creativity and initiative are encouraged.
